author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tui-dashboard
content: [decision] Used ratatui 0.30 + crossterm 0.29 (latest stable). Tab trait is db-agnostic — IssuesTab stores a snapshot and refreshes on 'r'. Detail view loads on-demand via Enter. handle_key trait doesn't take a db ref to keep the trait generic; db-dependent ops use separate methods.
